steps: Go to https://insights.hotjar.com and log in to your Hotjar account
In the left-hand menu, click 'Settings' (gear icon)
Select the Organization for which you want to create credentials
Enter a name for the credential and select the required scopes
Copy the Client ID and Client Secret — the secret is only shown once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (Access Token)
credential_fields.description: The Bearer access token obtained from Hotjar after exchanging client_id and client_secret at /v1/oauth/token

notes: Hotjar uses a two-step process: first generate client_id and client_secret in the dashboard, then exchange them for a Bearer access token via POST /v1/oauth/token
API credentials (client_id + client_secret) automatically expire after 1 year and must be regenerated
Only users with Admin permissions can generate API credentials
The client secret is shown only once at creation — save it immediately
Hotjar API access requires a paid plan (Business or Scale)
